residual_risks: Repo-local preflight and local harness evidence does not prove actual OrbStack/OpenClaw pod execution, live GitHub auth, native device behavior, GitHub branch protection, EAS production submit, Jira, Confluence, or other external platform state; PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md:342 and REPO_OPERATIONS.md:138-140 define that boundary.

The separate post-evidence `pnpm run validate:evidence-hygiene` rerun is reported in the review prompt, while the reviewed durable evidence source backs evidence hygiene through the recorded `pnpm run test:runtime` output at .evidence/wm-pod-role-bootstrap-preflight-command-output.md:48-49.
New fixture and evidence files were untracked at review time and must be included in the eventual branch/PR for CI and reviewers to see the same implementation surface.
